name: todo-action
description: GitHub Action that creates issues for TODO comments introduced in a commit or pull request diff.
author: GPT Codex 5.5 with supervision from Yash Mittal (@techsavvyash)

scripts.format: oxfmt --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json action.yml README.md .github/workflows/ci.yml
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src tests package.json tsconfig.json action.yml README.md .github/workflows/ci.yml
scripts.all: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && npm run format:check
